---
name: Security issue (DO NOT USE — see SECURITY.md)
about: Security vulnerabilities are reported privately, not in public issues
labels: security
---

# Stop.

Security vulnerabilities must be reported privately via the
**GitHub Security Advisory** flow:

https://github.com/Kai-Sign/KaiSign-Extension/security/advisories/new

This is required because public issues are visible before a fix lands,
which can put users at risk. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for
full details.

**Please close this issue and use the Security Advisory link instead.**
